no_changes_rationale:
Bead ddx-0965a321 — no changes required.

(a) What is done:
  - Verified cli/internal/server/workers_test.go contains 0 occurrences of `ExecuteBeadLoopOptions{` (the AC target).
  - Ran `go test ./internal/server/...` — all packages pass (server, server/graphql, server/perf).

(b) What is blocking:
  - Nothing. The acceptance criteria are already satisfied by prior commits to this file. The most recent migration-style commit on this file is 72d60f2b "refactor(test): migrate test scaffolding from Runner to service-based fixtures", which appears to have already eliminated any ExecuteBeadLoopOptions literals from workers_test.go before this bead was queued.
  - The only ExecuteBeadLoop-related references remaining are `agent.ExecuteBeadLoopStore` interface usages in BeadWorkerFactory closures (lines 673, 774, 886), which are not options literals and are out of scope for this bead.

(c) What a follow-up attempt would need:
  - None for this file. If SD-024 stage 1 has additional files needing migration, they should be tracked as separate beads. The bead description scopes this work to a single file (workers_test.go), and that file is clean.
